name: Green Beans and Bamboo Shoots
recipeInstructions:
1. French cut the green beans.
2. Cut the bamboo shoots into 1/2-inch pieces.
3. Cover and microwave the frozen green beans in a 1-quart casserole on high (100%) until tender, about 6 to 7 minutes.
4. Drain the green beans.
5. Stir in the remaining ingredients.
6. Microwave uncovered until hot, about 1 minute.
